description: peer-round --round 1 --message 'please open' from a mediator-registered sender broadcasts with the '[Round 1] ' prefix to every live peer in the room. Sender role=mediator suppresses the warning; output is the standard broadcast line with the prefix surfaced in inbox.body.
pre_sql: INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at, receive_mode) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'alpha', 'claude', 'mediator', 'sk-alpha', 'test-room', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', 'interactive'); INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at, receive_mode) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'beta',  'claude', 'peer',     'sk-beta',  'test-room', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', 'interactive'); INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at, receive_mode) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'gamma', 'claude', 'peer',     'sk-gamma', 'test-room', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', 'interactive');
